results.rendered_html:
viruta p. p.
1 Screamed, shouted.
2 Resounding, filled with cries.
— ta
1 Crying, shrieking, roaring &c.
2 Cry, sound, noise, clamour, din.
3 Singing, humming, chirping, buzzing; parabhṛtavirutaṃ kalaṃ yathā prativacanīkṛtamebhirīdṛśaṃ  Ś. 4. 9.
